china_crude.pipelineNote: Includes ESPO Russia→China (~600 kbd), Kazakhstan-China (~220 kbd), Myanmar-China (~200 kbd) — ~1,020 kbd Hormuz-independent

iraq_crude.pipelineNote: Includes Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline (~250 kbd) to Turkey since Mar 17 2026

russia_crude.pipelineNote: Includes ESPO pipeline (~600 kbd) to China

saudi_arabia_crude.pipelineNote: Includes Yanbu-SUMED pipeline (~1,500 kbd) to Egypt/Mediterranean since Mar 11 2026
